---
name: ⚠️ Report a hazard
about: Add a real safety warning to the map
title: "[hazard] "
labels: hazard, content, priority
---

## Where?
- Place name:
- Coordinates (lat, lon):

## What kind of hazard?
<!-- Pick: road_closure, weather, wildlife, no_signal, dangerous_terrain, water, other -->

## What's the danger?
<!-- Be specific. "People die here" is more useful than "be careful". -->

## Severity
<!-- info | warning | danger -->

## When does it apply?
<!-- All year? Winter only? After rain? Specific months/weeks? -->

## What should travelers do?
<!-- Concrete advice: "go with a guide", "satellite phone required", "don't go after Oct 15". -->

## Source
<!-- News article, official notice, personal experience, ranger statement. Link if possible. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] This is a real hazard, not a hypothetical concern
- [ ] I've included a source or a clear personal account
- [ ] The advice is actionable
